subject: Corvisquire, a dark blue-black corvid bird creature surrounded by blue energy wisps or wind effects
description: A sleek, dark blue-black bird creature is depicted amid swirling blue-white energy or wind effects. The creature has a corvid silhouette — streamlined body, sharp beak, and defined wing structure. Blue ethereal wisps or kinetic energy trails surround it, giving the impression of speed or elemental power. The background is an electric blue-white gradient, reinforcing the sense of dynamic motion or charged atmosphere. The posture suggests alert readiness or mid-motion. The overall palette is cool and stark: deep blues, blacks, and bright cyan-white highlights.
foreground: Dark blue-black corvid bird with blue-white energy wisps surrounding it
background: Electric blue-white gradient, energy or wind effect trails
emotion: Alert, sharp, purposeful — upright stance and surrounding energy suggest readiness to strike
